pi_items.source: Python analysis of the Natural Earth dataset reveals 177 total features. The verifier (verifier.py) explicitly enforces a tolerance of +/- 5 features, yielding a minimum of 172.
Python analysis of the Natural Earth dataset reveals 177 total features. The verifier (verifier.py) explicitly enforces a tolerance of +/- 5 features, yielding a maximum of 182.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires merging two shapefiles ('eurasia_countries.shp' with 86 features and 'rest_countries.shp' with 91 features) into a single file at '/home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/world_merged.shp'. The base data is the real-world Natural Earth 110m cultural countries dataset, containing exactly 177 features in total. The verifier enforces a total feature count between 172 and 182.
